meaning: vt.递送,陈述,释放,发表(一篇演说等),交付,引渡,瞄准,给予(打击)
examples: We deliver the goods in batches.
The question is, can he deliver?
We promise to deliver within 48 hours.
We are prepared to deliver a draft merger agreement to you and begin discussions immediately.
Madison Avenue giants are scrambling to find new ways to deliver their products to ad-drenched consumers.
